questions.question: What is the primary function of the `read.csv()` function in R?
questions.hint: It reads a comma-separated values (CSV) file into a data frame.

questions.question: Suppose you have a dataset named 'employees' and you want to export it as an Excel file. Which R function would you use?
Which R function is used to remove missing values from a dataset?
questions.hint: You would use the `na.omit()` function or impute missing values using `complete.cases()`.
